notes: Fixture project lives at docs-guideline-workspace/fixtures/widget-svc/. Each run works on its own copy (copied into the run's output dir) so the fixture stays pristine. The fixture has an archived OpenSpec change (add-rate-limiting), a partial docs/tech tree, a research report that proposed Redis (superseded by the shipped in-process bucket), and minimal as-built code.

evals.name: archive-time-curation
evals.prompt: 我刚把 OpenSpec change `2026-05-20-add-rate-limiting` archive 了，限流功能已经实现并合并。帮我把这次的技术文档整理到 docs/ 下，建好索引。项目在当前目录。
evals.expected_output: as-built docs curated from the archived change: protocol/v1.0 gains the 429 + Retry-After error; server/README gains the rate-limit middleware section (权威源 = internal/ratelimit) linking out to protocol rather than restating it; tech/README routing table updated; research/2026-05-15-rate-limit-options marked STALE (Redis proposal superseded by in-process bucket) pointing to the new tech doc; durable 'why in-process not Redis' carried over, change choreography dropped; a recall-path summary.

evals.name: new-module-skeleton
evals.prompt: 我们新加了个后台 worker 模块，代码在 src/worker/（目前就一个 reaper，定时清理软删除的 widgets）。帮我在 docs/tech 下把它的文档骨架和索引建好。项目在当前目录。
evals.expected_output: a new module subdir docs/tech/worker/README.md following the module-narrative shape: header blockquote with one-line locate + 权威源 src/worker/, links out to shared artifacts (it shares the widgets table → links to server/store or protocol as appropriate); tech/README.md routing table gains a row for the worker; does NOT invent a top-level dir for a single-module concern; does NOT duplicate the widgets schema.

evals.name: small-change-placement-restraint
evals.prompt: 我给 GET /v1/widgets 加了个可选的分页参数 ?limit=（不传就用默认值，老客户端不受影响）。这个要不要写文档？写哪？项目在当前目录。
evals.expected_output: recognizes this is a wire-contract change → belongs in protocol/v1.0; makes a focused edit to the existing endpoint definition (notes it's backward-compatible, so a minor-version note rather than a new v2.0; v1.1 bump is a judgment call either way); does NOT create a new standalone file or restate the whole protocol; updates the index only if needed; keeps it proportional to a small change rather than ceremony.
